channel.title: CWE-346 on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in CWE-346 on ZAP

item.title: Avoid permissive regex origin checks
item.description:
Detects unsafe postMessage usage and message event handling issues (missing origin validation, wildcard targetOrigin, tainted data flowing into DOM/code sinks).

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: Avoid postMessage with wildcard targetOrigin
item.description:
Detects unsafe postMessage usage and message event handling issues (missing origin validation, wildcard targetOrigin, tainted data flowing into DOM/code sinks).

item.title: Avoid weak origin substring checks

Detects unsafe postMessage usage and message event handling issues (missing origin validation, wildcard targetOrigin, tainted data flowing into DOM/code sinks).

item.title: Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking
item.description: Server accepted WebSocket connection through HTTP Upgrade request with modified Origin header.

item.title: Message handler without origin validation
item.description:
Detects unsafe postMessage usage and message event handling issues (missing origin validation, wildcard targetOrigin, tainted data flowing into DOM/code sinks).
